name: Chocolate Nut Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs until light and frothy.
2. Gradually add one cup sugar, continue beating.
3. Add the remaining sugar and beat until light and fluffy.
4. Combine butter with milk and gradually fold into egg mixture.
5. Sift in dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt) and vanilla; mix well.
6. Pour batter into a greased pan and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
7. Allow to cool completely, then cut into four layers.
Frosting:
1. Heat 2 cups milk in a double boiler until hot but not boiling.
2. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (sugar, flour, cocoa, cold milk, butter,
powdered sugar, vanilla) to the hot milk and stir constantly over simmered
water for about 20 minutes, or until thickened.
3. Remove from heat and let cool at room temperature.
4. Beat butter with powdered sugar until creamy.
5. Add the cooled frosting mixture and vanilla; beat until smooth.
6. Spread between layers and on top and sides of cake.
7. Decorate with chopped nuts.
